summary_line: VC-backed subscription advisory founded by Adam Dell (repeat founder — Clarity Money → Goldman Sachs / MessageOne → Dell / Buzzsaw → Autodesk). 30+ CFP®s on staff, advisor board chaired by Joe Duran (founded United Capital, sold to GS). Three published tiers: Essential ($3,900 yr1 / $2,900 renewal), Strategic ($5,200 / $4,200, 'most popular'), Comprehensive ($9,000 / $8,000). 39 employees, 14 advisors, $43.3M AUM, 0 DRPs. VC: Bessemer · SV Angel · Maveron · Torch · RRE · LPs including Ashton Kutcher + Marc Benioff. 'No hidden or AUM fees—ever.' Direct subscription competitor with serious capital behind it.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 316434 — 39 employees, 14 advisors, $43,285,190 regulatory AUM (low for employee count — confirms subscription-first revenue model), 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'DOMAIN MONEY ADVISORS, LLC.'

Site capture: extract.ts captured homepage only; WebFetch on /pricing and /about. Three published subscription tiers (annual prices, Year 1 vs. Renewal): Essential — $3,900 / $2,900 (W-2 professionals + DIYers needing a second opinion). Strategic ('Most Popular') — $5,200 / $4,200 (families + mid-career 'busy-complex'). Comprehensive — $9,000 / $8,000 (HNW + pre-retirees). 'No hidden or AUM fees—ever' / No minimums / 'Cancel anytime' / 100% satisfaction guarantee with refund. Founder/CEO Adam Dell — Clarity Money (sold to Goldman Sachs / led Marcus product), MessageOne (sold to Dell), Buzzsaw (sold to Autodesk). VC: Bessemer Venture Partners, SV Angel, Maveron, Torch Capital, RRE Ventures. Notable LPs: Ashton Kutcher, Marc Benioff. Advisory board chair: Joe Duran (founded United Capital, sold to Goldman). 30+ CFP®s + engineering leadership (Zeeshan Mian VP Eng) + ops/growth/design/marketing/client success. Positioning: 'We believe the right thing to do with your money should never be some big secret.' / 'Flat-fee, judgement free expert financial planning for the next generation.'

_schema._applicability: VC-backed subscription advisory — pricing_model: subscription, ownership_structure: pe_backed.
